name: Odoo Client Won → Create Zammad Customer

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'common', method: 'authenticate', args: [$json.odoo_db, $json.odoo_username, $json.odoo_api_key, {}] }, id: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $('Config').item.json.odoo_db, $json.result, $('Config').item.json.odoo_api_key, 'crm.lead', 'search_read', [[['stage_id.name', '=', 'Won'], ['write_date', '>=', new Date(Date.now() - 3600000).toISOString()]]], { fields: ['name', 'partner_name', 'contact_name', 'email_from', 'phone', 'partner_id'], limit: 50 } ] }, id: 2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ firstname: $('Split Into Items').item.json.firstname, lastname: $('Split Into Items').item.json.lastname, email: $('Split Into Items').item.json.email, phone: $('Split Into Items').item.json.phone, organization: $('Split Into Items').item.json.company, roles: ['Customer'], active: true, note: 'Auto-created from Odoo Won lead: ' + $('Split Into Items').item.json.odoo_lead_name }) }}
